title: lannea obcordata
intro: Lannea obcordata, also known as the African cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Lannea obcordata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
